src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Liquibase properties import path to match Spring Boot 3.2+ package structure.
Replace deprecated single marker access with the new marker list API to comply with SLF4J 2.x requirements in Java 21 environments.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed event.getMarker() check to event.getMarkerList() and added import for java.util.List.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Updated import statements to reflect package structure changes in Spring Boot 3.x.
Update Spring Boot import statements to reflect package restructuring in newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace deprecated acceptsProfiles with matchesProfiles for environment profile checking.
Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson to align with the new Jackson distribution used in the target framework version.
Update the method signature to throw JacksonException instead of JsonProcessingException to match the new Jackson API.
